description_long: This object is a wedge-shaped slice of orange, featuring a thick, textured orange rind encasing a juicy, segmented interior. The rind is a vibrant orange color with a slightly rough, matte finish, while the interior flesh is a lighter orange with visible segment lines and a moist, slightly translucent appearance. The cut surfaces reveal the fibrous, pulpy structure of the fruit, and the base of the wedge shows a small remnant of the stem. The overall form is curved, with the rind forming a crescent around the softer fruit inside. The object appears fresh, with no significant blemishes or signs of decay. Its size and shape suggest it could be found as discarded food waste or as part of a street vendor's offering in an urban environment.
description: A fresh, wedge-shaped orange slice with a thick, textured rind and juicy, segmented interior. The vibrant orange rind contrasts with the lighter, moist flesh inside.
description_view_0: A side view showing the curved orange rind and the segmented, juicy interior of the orange slice.
description_view_1: An angled view highlighting the pointed end of the wedge and the thickness of the rind, with the stem remnant visible.
description_view_2: A mirrored side view similar to view 0, showing the opposite side of the orange slice with the same rind and flesh details.
description_view_3: An angled view from the opposite end, emphasizing the base of the wedge and the small stem remnant.
attribute_location_or_placement: sidewalk, street, park bench, or near food vendors
